name: Fortinet FortiGate
description: Monitor Fortinet FortiGate firewall and UTM security appliance for firewall policies, admin users, system configuration, firmware status, and logging compliance

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Verifies firewall policies are configured to protect network traffic and segment environments

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews FortiGate administrator users and access controls for system management

checks.name: Systems Description
checks.description: Documents FortiGate system information including hostname, firmware version, and operational status

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies FortiGate syslog configuration for centralized logging and monitoring
